title: Why U Lie
lyrics: Why you lie, why you lie, why you lie When I try, why you lie, and say you're here We're fancy, I like to put it the way I put it to you What you do for others fucking comes back to you So why you lie, so why you lie I know it makes sense cause you're sitting there lost in the midst of life To be taken from your body cause you can't see the way That anxiety rocking in your brain Cause you gotta make up to the others, gotta be a swim wing Gotta be you, you're gonna take it no matter what state you're in And then you lie, you're high, and then you lie, you're high And then you lie, you're high Not going anywhere today, lost in anxiety Not going anywhere tomorrow Cause I don't feel that good about me But yeah, I tell everyone I'm here I'm number one on the rise, I got it all But why I lie When everything comes, hurts me too Why I lie, why I lie Can't even pick up a gun, man, what should I do Take it, yeah, why you take it Yeah, just take it, yeah Cause I believe there's a better thing than a bad degree Of like, yo, honesty encapsulates What you do to be competitive, reality I may be a little lost in the storm But I know what hope is I know what trust is Why you lie, why you lie on me Why you lie, oh why you lie Oh why you lie It's not like you're a snake Many shades of layers, I know I made the same fucking mistakes Why you lie, why you lie No judgment here baby Why you lie, why you lie Wish I could Give you the comfort of knowing if you were true to you Everything would be good, hey You have to sit back and depart from this moment It's funny now that it's been real But I gotta keep moving on with the truth Hope you find you something Find you I'll see you soon motherfucker

lyricsSegments.text: Why you lie, why you lie, why you lie When I try, why you lie, and say you're here
We're fancy, I like to put it the way I put it to you
What you do for others fucking comes back to you
So why you lie, so why you lie
I know it makes sense cause you're sitting there lost in the midst of life
To be taken from your body cause you can't see the way
That anxiety rocking in your brain
Cause you gotta make up to the others, gotta be a swim wing
Gotta be you, you're gonna take it no matter what state you're in
And then you lie, you're high, and then you lie, you're high
And then you lie, you're high
Not going anywhere today, lost in anxiety
Not going anywhere tomorrow
Cause I don't feel that good about me
But yeah, I tell everyone I'm here
I'm number one on the rise, I got it all
But why I lie
When everything comes, hurts me too
Why I lie, why I lie
Can't even pick up a gun, man, what should I do
Take it, yeah, why you take it
Yeah, just take it, yeah
Cause I believe there's a better thing than a bad degree
Of like, yo, honesty encapsulates
What you do to be competitive, reality
I may be a little lost in the storm
But I know what hope is
I know what trust is
Why you lie, why you lie on me
Why you lie, oh why you lie
Oh why you lie
It's not like you're a snake
Many shades of layers, I know I made the same fucking mistakes
Why you lie, why you lie
No judgment here baby
Why you lie, why you lie
Wish I could
Give you the comfort of knowing if you were true to you
Everything would be good, hey
You have to sit back and depart from this moment
It's funny now that it's been real
But I gotta keep moving on with the truth
Hope you find you something
Find you
I'll see you soon motherfucker
